themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "As the dew of Hermon, and as the dew that descended upon the mountains of Zion . For there th...". Word-study detail reinforces "הַבְּרָכָ֑ה: the blessing - benediction; by implication prosperity".
